title: lathyrus linnaei proles occidentalis
intro: Lathyrus linnaei proles occidentalis, also known as the Western sweet pea, is a perennial legume plant native to the western United States and Canada. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a natural diuretic and to reduce inflammation. The plant's health benefits include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of heart disease, and provide antioxidant properties, making it a useful addition to herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Western sweet pea include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support cardiovascular health and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes.
